title: expr.normalize request

expr.description: Action-specific expr input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

line_limit.description: Limits returned evidence rows only, not scanning, aggregation, or the verdict; read completeness fields as well.

no_statement_only.description: Action-specific no_statement_only input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

role.description: Action-specific role input. Its type and accepted values are defined by this schema.

signal.description: Final leaf signal path. Aggregate, array, and struct roots are not expanded automatically.

time_unit.description: Interprets only unitless time numbers; it never overrides a time string that already has a unit.

description: Normalize an expression for deterministic processing.
x-how_it_works: 无 design 时做字符串级规范化；有 design/signal 时可结合设计赋值信息。
x-when_to_use: 把表达式转成 agent 更易处理的结构。

do_not_use_when: 不要把本 action 用于 expr.eval_at 的业务目标；请改用列出的同域 action。

alternatives.when: 在指定时间求布尔/表达式值。
